# The Convergence Documentation Index

> Enterprise framework for self-evolving AI agents.

## Getting Started
- README.md: Project overview, architecture, and quick start
- QUICKSTART.md: Quick start guide for first-time users
- GETTING_STARTED.md: Detailed setup and first project walkthrough
- INSTALLATION.md: Installation methods and requirements

## SDK Reference
- SDK_USAGE.md: SDK API reference and usage patterns
- SDK_MIGRATION.md: Migration guide between versions
- YAML_CONFIGURATION_REFERENCE.md: All YAML configuration options

## Guides
- TROUBLESHOOTING.md: Common issues and solutions
- SECURITY.md: Security model and practices
- CONTRIBUTING.md: Contribution guidelines
- CHANGELOG.md: Version history and changes

## Examples (Cookbook)
- examples/README.md: Cookbook navigation and overview
- examples/STYLE_GUIDE.md: Example writing guidelines
- examples/00_quickstart/README.md: Progressive quickstart (10 examples)
- examples/01_apps/README.md: End-to-end sample apps (3 apps)
- examples/02_optimization/README.md: Thompson Sampling deep dives
- examples/03_knowledge/README.md: Context graph patterns
- examples/04_safety/README.md: Safety and validation
- examples/05_observability/README.md: Metrics and monitoring
- examples/06_teams/README.md: Multi-agent team patterns
- examples/07_workflows/README.md: Pipeline and workflow optimization
- examples/08_caching/README.md: Advanced caching patterns
- examples/09_production/README.md: Production deployment patterns
- examples/90_models/README.md: Provider integrations (Claude, OpenAI, Groq, Azure, Ollama)
- examples/91_tools/README.md: Custom tool implementations
- examples/92_integrations/README.md: External services (Discord, Gmail, Reddit)
- examples/93_testing/README.md: Testing patterns
- examples/94_yaml_configs/README.md: YAML configuration examples

## Core Modules
- convergence/__init__.py: Package exports and public API
- convergence/sdk.py: Programmatic optimization interface (run_optimization)
- convergence/core/runtime.py: CivilizationRuntime - agent simulation engine
- convergence/core/config.py: ConvergenceConfig and type definitions
- convergence/core/protocols.py: Agent, LLMProvider, MABStrategy protocols
- convergence/runtime/online.py: Runtime MAB selection (configure, select, update)
- convergence/runtime/reward_evaluator.py: Multi-signal reward computation

## Optimization
- convergence/optimization/rl_optimizer.py: RL meta-optimizer (MAB + RL layers)
- convergence/optimization/runner.py: OptimizationRunner for batch optimization
- convergence/optimization/evolution.py: Evolutionary parameter optimization

## Knowledge
- convergence/knowledge/graph.py: ContextGraph (WHO/WHAT/HOW triad)
- convergence/knowledge/schema.py: GraphNode, GraphEdge, EntityType, OntologyType

## Safety
- convergence/safety/: Framework-level guardrails (NeMo + Guardrails AI)

## Cache
- convergence/cache/semantic.py: SemanticCache for embedding-based response caching
- convergence/cache/backends.py: Cache backends (memory, SQLite, Redis)

## Clients
- convergence/clients/claude.py: ClaudeClient with confidence extraction and MAB integration

## Evaluators
- convergence/evaluators/confidence.py: Confidence extraction from LLM text
- convergence/evaluators/base.py: Base evaluator interface

## Storage
- convergence/storage/sqlite.py: SQLite storage backend
- convergence/storage/postgresql.py: PostgreSQL storage backend
- convergence/storage/memory.py: In-memory storage backend

## Types
- convergence/types/response.py: LLMResponse with gap detection
- convergence/types/config.py: Configuration models (ApiConfig, SearchSpaceConfig, etc.)
- convergence/types/runtime.py: Runtime types (RuntimeConfig, RuntimeSelection, etc.)
